calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-10-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Oct-02-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Frank J. Drago, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Philip T. Kilduff, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Hudson & Keyse, LLC.
No appearance by defendant Emily Louise Liestner-Weakley.
Default entered against defendant on August 4, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on August 4, 2008.
Order waiving appearance of witness at default prove-up hearing was filed on October 1, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Hudson & Keyse, LLC, and against the Defaulted Defendant Emily Louise Leistner-Weakley as follows:

Damages/Principal - $27,888.50.
Prejudgment Interest - $10,909.92.
Attorney's Fees - $0.00.
Costs - $398.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $39,196.42.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Sep-25-2008 Continued To Oct-02-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
